extraction_notes: Extracted from Adobe 2025 filing. Three segments identified: Digital Media, Digital Experience, and Publishing and Advertising. Customer types mapped to canonical labels (consumers, large enterprises, developers). Channels include direct sales, online, retail, distributors, resellers, OEMs, system integrators, and marketplaces. Revenue models include subscription, licensing, advertising, consumption-based, and service fees. Geographic scope is Worldwide.
